title: Industrial Foregoing: Woot Addon
description: Woot Revived Addon that add compatibility with Industrial Foregoing
body:
# Industrial Foregoing: Woot Addon

An addon for [Woot Revived](https://modrinth.com/mod/woot-revived) that add compatibility with [Industrial Foregoing](https://modrinth.com/mod/industrial-foregoing).

It adds 3 upgrades:
- Mob Crusher Upgrade: Produce mob essence depending of the XP drop.
- Mob Slaugther Factory Upgrade: Produce Pink Slime/Meat depending of the mob health & type.
- Laser Drill Upgrade: Produce mob specific fluid laser drill recipes

It also adds some recipes to the laser drills to obtain stygian dust & mob tears fluid
